---
name: New Detection Rule
about: Propose a new Sigma detection rule
title: '[RULE] <technique_id> - <short_name>'
labels: 'detection-rule, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## ATT&CK Technique

**Technique ID**: T1xxx.xxx  
**Tactic**: e.g., Credential Access  
**Technique Name**: e.g., OS Credential Dumping: LSASS Memory

## Rationale

Why should this technique be detected? What adversary groups use it?

## Detection Approach

What log source / event ID will the rule target?

## Simulation Method

How can this rule be validated with Atomic Red Team or manual simulation?

## False Positive Considerations

Known legitimate software or admin activities that might trigger this rule.
